propositions: A completion-verifier FAIL verdict surfaces unmet criteria piecemeal across rounds, costing extra remediation cycles.
The verifier prompt must require per-criterion exhaustive evaluation, emitting one finding per unmet criterion on FAIL, and declare subset-only verdicts incomplete.
A new deterministic scorer enumerates_all_unmet_criteria must be implemented and registered, scoring 1.0 only on a bijective match of each expected_unmet_criteria substring to a distinct finding.
The eval spec must reference the scorer and add a CV-two-unmet-criteria case with two independent AC gaps expecting FAIL.
A FakeRunner unit test must assert a two-finding FAIL verdict survives reconcile_verdict and the close path with all findings intact.
reconcile_verdict and close-path logic must remain byte-unchanged with no reconciliation or threshold edits.
